description: Anaconda Navigator is open on the Environments tab showing the base (root) environment. Add the 'conda-forge' channel by clicking the 'Channels' button and adding 'conda-forge' as a new channel source. After adding the channel, update the package index, then search for and install the 'seaborn' package from the available packages list. Once installed, verify that seaborn appears in the installed packages list for the base environment. All actions must be performed through the Navigator GUI.
